All verification fields (tests, bdd, coverage_details, quality_gates, independent_tests, arch_review) are null, which constitutes ABSENT SIGNAL per Absence-of-Failure Guard #5. The Player's report contains the same path formatting errors flagged in Turn 1 feedback (backtick-prefixed file paths), preventing the orchestrator from completing evidence collection.
